purpose: Trigger validation after implementing separated validation modes, full-report renderer, and daily record sync script. Remaining failures should identify generated data that still needs to be rerendered or synced.
marketDataRulesExpected: market-data ingestion was attempted before the daily update
partial market data degrades dataQuality instead of aborting the update
missing OHLCV fields remain null and are not fabricated
dashboard and full report reference the partial market-data status
reflexiveChecksExpected: Reflexive check is based on the day's M7 conflict signals
Reflexive check separates AI supply-chain beneficiaries from AI Capex spenders
Dashboard only keeps the full-report entry point and no longer exposes Archive on the main hero
Dashboard full-report link uses cache-busting version parameters
Full report contains top and bottom links back to Dashboard
Full report contains a history-report entry point outside the dashboard
Full report source section uses real clickable links
